s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LAP BELT OUTER ANCHOR COVER

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and remove the lap belt outer anchor cover.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and disconnect the floor end of the front seat outer belt assembly.
Disengage the 7 claws and 3 clips, and remove the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and remove the lower center pillar garnish LH.
Disengage the clip and remove the upper center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and disconnect the shoulder anchor of the front seat outer belt assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SHOULDER BELT ANCHOR ADJUSTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and the front shoulder belt anchor adjuster assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, pull out the locking button in the direction shown by the arrow to release the lock, and disconnect the connector as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and the front seat outer belt assembly.
